story.text:
# 🚪 AAIF (Agentic AI Foundation)
**gateway** · shared · narrative

First explicitly-named kindred-coalition (v1.5.1 · 2026-05-13). Linux Foundation project stewarding agentic-AI specifications: Goose 🪿 (Apache 2.0 · already in Bestia's bestiary at Tome VI Act 1), AGENTS.md (agent-instruction file standard), ACP (Agent Communication Protocol). Recognised at City Hall (/cityhall · V47). The fifth structural-relationship category (kindred-coalition) admits coalitions that host multiple admissible primitives; AAIF is the first instance. Bilateral civic-attestation pending coalition outreach.

## Edges in

- [[AGENTS.md ⊥ SOUL.md]] *references* →
- [[City of Mages]] *gateway_to* →
- [[City of Mages]] *kin_to* →
- [[City Hall]] *references* →
